Best Regards:
MR. DEEPESH MAJIGAMKAR
Mob:- + 91 9730358718 (whatsapp) // +91 9156366155

From: Chartering - Ocean Reaper Maritime <chartering@ocean-reaper.com>
Sent: 10 November 2025 10:11
To: Kavita Jantwal - Ocean Reaper Maritime <kavita.jantwal@ocean-reaper.com>
Subject: // FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : VEDANTA LTD OR NOM // IRON ORE, 2 X 55,000 MT +/- 10% MOLOO // PARADIP - CHINA // LAYCAN : 15 - 25 NOV'25

GOOD DAY !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Please submit all your bids by 14:00 hrs IST on 10th November 2025 to evaluate with validity of 24 hours. Any offer submission after the cut-off time will not be considered.
Charters reserve the right to conduct a reverse auction using their internal portal "Ariba.
* Offer has to be subitted basis Mid China range along with differential for south and North China
* 2 shipments to be performed within the specified window of 11 days
* Charterers to declare 4 days of laycan window 4 days before commencement of first day of laycan.
* Example : If 1st laycan window is 16-19 Nov then charterers will declare the laycan on or before 12th Nov 2025.
* Charterers will not declare over lapping window.

TWO SHIPMENTS
ACCT : Vedanta Ltd or nominee
CARGO : Iron Ore in bulk one or two grades
QUANTITY : 2 x 55,000 MT +/- 10 pct moloo
LAYCAN : 15th November 2025 to 25th November 2025
LOAD PORT : 1 SP 1 SB JSW Terminal, Paradip port, ECI.
DISCHARGE PORT : 1-2 SP 1-2SB 1-2 SA China, CHOPT
LOAD RATE : 50,000 tpwwdshinc
DISCHARGE RATE : 15,500 tpwwdshinc

ADDCOM 1.25% ON FDD. + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
Type of vessel: Geared
Age: Not exceeding 15 years.
For freight and demurrage terms - refer enquiry terms.
All bids to have named vessels.
In case of any successful bidder not being able to perform as per the finally agreed laycan or rates, compensation in the form of Lumpsum fee or any contractual damage incurred by Charterers, whichever is higher shall be charged from owners.
In case that the original B/L does not reach the discharging port timely for custom entry and clearance prior to the vessel's arrival at the discharging port, owners shall agree to discharge the cargo without original BL into custody of agent and held until original B/L produced, against chrts LOI in format provided by owners.
However Cargo will be only delivered against presentation of Original Bill of Lading.
...
KIND REGARDS,
Ms KAVITA JANTWAL
M : +91 9971050029 | +91 9899665398
Skype : kavita_1oct80@hotmail.com
E : chartering@ocean-reaper.com
